name: Kangjin Kim, DPH
title: Assistant Professor
department: Department of Applied Statistics, Gachon University
bio: Kangjin Kim, DPH, is an assistant professor in the Department of Applied Statistics at Gachon University. He completed postdoctoral research training at Harvard Medical School and Brigham and Women’s Hospital, where he worked on whole-genome sequencing, proteomics, pulmonary function, mucus plugging, and COPD data science. His lab emphasizes rigorous biostatistics, statistical genetics, survival and prediction modeling, and reproducible analysis of high-dimensional biomedical data.
